name: shadcn
description: shadcn/ui MCP server — gives AI agents structured access to component registries, docs, and CLI commands
install_note: Auto-configured per project via 'pnpm dlx shadcn@latest mcp init --client claude'. Creates .mcp.json in project root.
when_to_install: Any project using shadcn/ui — gives agents ability to search, install, and inspect components via MCP
add_to_project: Add to project .mcp.json (not global settings.json) — each project has its own registry config
